sentences.text: Finish the research phase by building the one-page reader profile that powers every brief:
The moment: what's happening in their life when they hit your copy?
Stage of awareness: do they know the problem?
This decides your entire angle — you don't pitch features to someone who doesn't know they have the problem yet
The one belief: what single thing must they believe for the sale to happen?
All copy bends toward installing that belief
